chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D -543 of 2026 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 24.02.2026 Mr. Maqbool-ur-Rehman, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Hakim Ali Shaikh, Addl. A.G. Sindh along with PI Alah Nawazio, SDI/ SSP Complaint, IO/SIP Ali Dost and PI Ghous Bux, SHO PS Ibrahim Hyderi, Karachi. Mr. Zahoor Ahmed Shah, APG. ------------------------------------ Report along with copies of FIR and Challan filed by SHO Police Station Ibrahim Hyderi Karachi are taken on the record. Learned Addl. A.G. submits that since the case has been challaned therefore, petitioner may avail remedy under the law and instant petition may be disposed of having become infructuous. When confronted, learned counsel for the petitioner also seeks disposal of petition. Since the case/FIR, subject matter of this petition, has been challaned and is now pending trial before the competent court of jurisdiction, hence in view of dicta laid down by Apex Court in case of Director General, Anti- Corruption Establishment, Lahore and others Vs. Muhammad Akram Khan and others reported as PLD 2013 SC 401, this petition has become infructuous, which is hereby dismissed. However, the petitioner would be at liberty to approach the learned trial Court for redressal of his grievances/ anticipatory bail. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Azeem
